hero.title: Capital Food International
hero.subtitle: High-quality tuna, sardines, and mackerel prepared to meet international food standards.

about.title: About Us — Premium Seafood Products
about.description: Founded in 2014, we are a dedicated producer and supplier of high-quality seafood products, including tuna, sardines, and mackerel. Our focus on consistent quality, industry standards, and reliable sourcing supports our partnerships with retailers and food distributors.
about.quality2: Adherence to food safety and industry standards.
about.sustainableDesc: We aim for responsible sourcing and adherence to ethical practices throughout our operations.
about.traceabilityDesc: We maintain transparency in our supply processes from production to delivery.

products.title: Product Range
products.subtitle: Our core offerings meet the highest international standards for quality and safety.
products.tunaDesc: High-quality canned tuna produced under strict food industry standards. Ideal for retail and distribution markets.
products.sardinesDesc: Nutritious sardines processed to consistent quality levels for consumer and commercial use.
products.mackerelDesc: Canned mackerel fillets prepared according to international production norms, offering reliable and versatile supply.

exhibitions.title: Exhibitions
exhibitions.subtitle: Meet us at the world's leading food and seafood trade shows.

global.title: Active in International Markets
global.subtitle: Supplying canned tuna, sardines, and mackerel to distribution partners across regional and international markets.

cta.title: Looking for a trusted seafood supplier?
cta.subtitle: Partner with a global export leader. Get in touch for quotes and product information.

meta.title: Premium Seafood Supplier | Trusted Worldwide
meta.description: High-quality tuna, sardines, and mackerel prepared to meet international food standards. Your global export partner.

meta.title: About Capital Food | Company Profile
meta.description: Capital Food delivers premium seafood with global quality standards and sustainable sourcing since 1994. Learn about our mission, values, and compliance.

hero.title: About Capital Food
hero.subtitle: Delivering premium seafood products with global quality standards and sustainable sourcing since 1994.

overview.title: A Legacy of Excellence in Global Seafood Export
overview.description: Capital Food has been a trusted name in premium seafood for over three decades. We combine traditional expertise with modern food safety and quality systems to deliver products that meet the highest international standards. Our commitment to sustainable sourcing and operational excellence has made us a preferred partner for retailers and distributors worldwide.

missionVision.visionDesc: To be the most trusted global seafood supplier, recognized for quality, sustainability, and partnership. We aim to set the standard for responsible sourcing and food safety in the industry.
missionVision.missionDesc: To deliver premium seafood products that meet the highest international standards while fostering long-term relationships with our customers. We commit to continuous improvement, food safety, and sustainable practices in every step of our operations.

qualityExcellence.title: Quality Excellence
qualityExcellence.desc: We maintain the highest standards in every product we deliver.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Transparent, ethical practices in all our business relationships.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety
foodSafety.desc: Rigorous controls and certifications to protect consumers.

customerPartnership.title: Customer Partnership
customerPartnership.desc: Long-term relationships built on trust and reliability.

continuousImprovement.title: Continuous Improvement
continuousImprovement.desc: Innovation and learning to stay ahead of industry standards.

qualityStandards.title: Global Compliance & Quality Standards
qualityStandards.description: We adhere to strict quality control and food safety management systems. Our facilities are designed and operated to meet international standards, ensuring every product meets regulatory requirements and customer expectations. From raw material intake to finished product dispatch, we maintain full traceability and documented procedures.

cta.title: Partner with a Trusted Seafood Supplier
cta.subtitle: Join distributors and retailers who rely on Capital Food for quality, compliance, and reliability.
